title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Nami, Unknown person #3, Luffy as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Call that last move? Gomu Gomu no... something...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's as if you're right there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that we should put our faith in this boy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Glad to see you've still got that big mouth, straw hat!! We call this an awakening. Your mind and body are finally able to harness the potential of your ability.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: and what a ridiculous power it is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I've lost a lot in this war...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My men, my castle, everything I've built here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I suppose the same is true for you, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not through yet!! I'm taking back everything you've stolen, no matter what!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
